skills.name: budget_lookup_connector
skills.description: Connects to internal financial spreadsheets/databases to pull vacancy budget lines.

skills.name: tco_calculator_engine
skills.description: Calculates the fully-loaded cost of a candidate including recruitment, hardware, benefits, and local taxes.

skills.name: taxation_rule_matrix
skills.description: Maps candidates to regional taxation models (FOP, B2B, employment contracts) for accurate cost projections.

skills.name: limit_threshold_alerter
skills.description: Generates alert warnings when proposed salaries exceed initial department limits.
